final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of Korean café-style coffee and pastries, shot on a smartphone for Instagram.

Style/medium: smartphone photography, Instagram aesthetic, flat lay and angled shots, photorealistic
Composition: overhead flat lay and 45-degree angle shots, natural framing, casual smartphone framing
Subject: Korean café latte art, iced coffee, croissants, tiramisu, macarons, minimalist ceramic plates, marble table surface
Scene/backdrop: bright Korean café interior, wooden tables, soft natural window light, clean minimalist aesthetic
Lighting/mood: soft natural daylight from large windows, bright and airy, cozy and inviting
Color palette: warm browns and creams from coffee and pastries, soft whites, muted pastels, natural wood tones
Materials/textures: glossy ceramic cups, flaky pastry layers, smooth latte foam, marble grain, matte wooden surfaces
Text (verbatim): "【描写规则】
・像用白色笔画出那样的细手绘线条
・一笔写成风格的粗糙、略微不均匀
・像描摹物体外周那样添加轮廓线
・用箭头或虚线制造视线引导
【文本规则】
・日语手写文字（平假名7成、简单汉字3成）
・简短，像自言自语一样的评论
・语气是"日记・一言・情感寄托"
【评论生成规则】
・饮料 → 味道・温度・心情（例：清爽、温柔的甜味）
・食物 → 口感・美味（例：湿润、最高）
・空间 → 氛围（例：放松、美好时光）
・整体 → 一言总结（例：幸福过头了～）
【装饰】
・蒸汽、闪闪发光、心形、小表情符号等适度添加
・不过度，留出"空白"
【完成风格】
・Instagram故事风、杂志的粗糙笔记风   ・时尚且轻松的氛围"
Constraints: no people in frame; handwritten annotation style overlay with thin white sketch lines, rough single-stroke style, outline tracing around objects, arrows and dotted lines for visual guidance; Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji), short diary-like comments; decorative elements: steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons used sparingly with intentional white space; Instagram story style, magazine rough notes aesthetic, fashionable and relaxed mood
Avoid: stock photo look, overly polished commercial photography, cluttered composition, heavy filters, watermark, 8K stuffer words
